title: Telemetry Masking Schema V1
description: Defines field-level sensitivity declarations and masking strategies for Lumina log events. Every event passing through the log bus may be transformed according to a masking policy before dispatch to subscribers. Strategies range from full redaction to reversible HMAC pseudonymisation.

schema_id.description: Fixed identifier for this masking policy schema.

version.description: Semantic version of this masking policy.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this policy protects.

fields.description: Ordered list of field masking rules. Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom; first match wins for each field path.

default_strategy.description: Strategy applied to fields not matched by any rule.

path.description: Dot-delimited path into the LogEvent dict (e.g. 'data.user_id', 'source', 'data.email'). Supports '*' as a single-level wildcard and '**' as a recursive wildcard.

sensitivity.description: Data classification level. public = no masking needed, internal = organisation-visible, confidential = role-gated, restricted = PII / secrets.

strategy.description: Transformation applied before the event reaches subscribers.

truncate_length.description: Required when strategy is 'truncate'. Number of leading characters to keep.
